ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research article */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the JSON file containing the article's metadata */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the article was published */,
  "pub_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the article */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the article */,
  "citations" TEXT /* Citations included in the article */,
  "cited_by" TEXT /* Articles that cite this article */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the article */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the article */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords extracted from the article's content */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency supporting the research */,
  "funding_id" TEXT /* Funding ID provided by the funding agency */,
  "licenses" TEXT /* Licenses associated with the article */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of times the article has been viewed */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of times the article has been downloaded */,
  "citations_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations for the article */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the article is classified under */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_txt" TEXT /* Text description of the topic */,
  "topics" TEXT /* Topic number assigned by the modeling algorithm */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic modeling algorithm used */,
  "model_params" TEXT /* Parameters used for the topic modeling algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* User's research interests */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the article was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information (e.g., browser, operating system) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_access_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
